title: isoberlinia niembaensis
intro: Isoberlinia niembaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the African ironplow tree or niemba tree. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bark and leaves of the Isoberlinia niembaensis contain flavonoids and other compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
